base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_logo_intact — a ui (logo) from 1986 castlevania. Film-reel border above/below. Shown after bat-flies-across-text animation completes. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
